title: Regional Digital & E-Commerce Executive
description:
E-Commerce Operations:

  • Oversee major online sales channels across marketplaces (e.g., Shopee, Lazada, Tokopedia, TikTok).
  • Ensure product listings, inventory, and content are accurate, engaging, and updated across all platforms.
  • Manage “Where to Buy” listings on brand websites to guide customers to the correct online and offline stores.

Campaign Management:

  • Plan and execute regional online campaigns such as mega sale events and product launches.
  • Collaborate with local country teams to roll out campaigns and new products aligned with regional marketing strategies.
  • Partner with the marketing team to deliver impactful campaign materials and content.

Performance Analytics:

  • Monitor and analyse key KPIs including traffic, conversion rates, sales, ROAS, and acquisition metrics.
  • Develop e-commerce dashboards and performance reports with actionable insights for continuous improvement.
  • Identify new growth opportunities through data analysis and competitive benchmarking.
  • Recommend strategies to boost campaign performance and operational efficiency.

Stakeholder Coordination:

  • Partner closely with regional and local teams to enhance brand and product visibility across e-commerce platforms.
  • Lead monthly performance reviews and address operational challenges with stakeholders.
  • Align e-commerce strategies with overall regional business goals.

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, E-Commerce, or a related field.
  • 3–5 years of experience in e-commerce, preferably handling multi-country operations in Southeast Asia.
  • Demonstrated success in online sales growth, marketplace management, and campaign execution.

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers


Wecruit Pte Ltd

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
